race.comment: Very strong Maiden with plenty of chances. ENVIABLE (7) resumes from a spell of nine months. Made good progress in her second prep with a minor placing over 1600m in the G2 Moonee Valley Fillies Classic last October. Primed with the two trials and expected to get through the conditions. Shouldn't be a Maiden for long. SNITZEL MISS (8) comes here with a massive fitness edge over her main rivals fifth-up. Met with solid support last start with a plugging fourth over 1350m at Wyong with the 59kg. Blinkers go on and maps well with the sharp weight drop. ULTIMATE WARRIOR (9) gave a good sight when he cruised across from the wide gate before tiring late when fourth to Rumdabar over 1300m here on a heavy (8) track. Sticky gate again and can take a hand in the finish. HELLFIGHTER (3) ten-start Maiden ready to win. Savaged the line with a close-up third over 1500m at Hawkesbury in a Super Maiden. Can race closer with the tongue-tie going on.
